summary: Complete testing of Production Go-Live DEPLOYMENT ORCHESTRATION features: deployment risk assessment, strategy, infrastructure topology, secrets manager, backup trigger/cleanup, and horizontal scaling. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend dashboard verified with all 8 tabs working correctly including the new Deployment tab with risk assessment, strategy, infrastructure panels.
critical_code_review_comments: All new deployment endpoints require authentication (verified with 12 auth tests)
Deployment Risk Assessment correctly calculates safety_score (20%), risk_score (80), verdict (HIGH_RISK) based on missing prod configs
Deployment Strategy returns 'canary' for high-risk scenarios with 10 components in ordered batches
Infrastructure topology includes complete config file inventory, monitoring stack, security layer
Grafana dashboards: Operations, Infrastructure, Business Metrics all listed
Secrets Manager uses 'env' provider in dev mode - health check returns 'healthy'
Backup trigger creates simulated backup with ID pattern 'bk_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_xxxx'
Horizontal scaling summary shows 'single' mode with statelessness validation
All panels rendered correctly in frontend with proper data-testid attributes

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 8 tabs verified, deployment tab with all 4 panels working)

seed_data_creation: None needed - tests use existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production Go-Live deployment orchestration fully tested. All 6 new endpoint groups working: (1) Deployment Risk Assessment with safety/risk scores and mitigations, (2) Deployment Strategy with canary/blue-green/rolling_update selection, (3) Infrastructure Topology with config files and monitoring stack, (4) Secrets Manager health/metrics, (5) Backup trigger/cleanup/history, (6) Horizontal Scaling summary and stateless check. System shows expected dev mode values: HIGH_RISK verdict (20% safety), canary strategy, NOT_READY status.

deployment_tab_panels.panel-risk: FOUND - shows safety_score, risk_score, verdict, risk factors, mitigations
deployment_tab_panels.panel-strategy: FOUND - shows strategy type, deployment order, pre/post checks, rollback plan
deployment_tab_panels.panel-infra-topology: FOUND - shows monitoring stack, security layer, config files, grafana dashboards
deployment_tab_panels.panel-deploy-backup: FOUND - shows enabled status, retention, RPO/RTO, trigger button

buttons_tested.trigger-backup-btn: VISIBLE and clickable - triggered backup successfully
